arts.ttl: Arsenal vs PSV Eindhoven – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal are virtually through to the quarter-finals of the Champions League at the expense of PSV Eindhoven before the second leg has even gotten underway. The Gunners ran riot last Wednesday as they put seven past their Dutch counterparts in a ruthless display. Noa Lang’s penalty offered the PSV fans a small consolation, but their […] The post Arsenal vs PSV Eindhoven – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta calls up 'very dangerous' young winger inspired by Alexis Sanchez to Arsenal training pre-PSV
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to take their place in the Champions League quarter-finals when they host PSV Eindhoven in their last-16 second leg on Wednesday night....

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs PSV: TV channel and live stream for Champions League today
arts.sum: It will take a spectacular collapse for Arsenal to not reach Champions League quarter-final

arts.ttl: Arsenal target €80m deal as 'DREAM' transfer revealed
arts.sum: FootballTransfers exclusively revealed that Newcastle United are eager to sign Ektike as a replacement for Alexander Isak, if the Sweden international leaves the club this summer, while Arsenal are now eyeing a possible deal. That is according to Sky Sport, who claim that Eintracht Frankfurt will demand a transfer fee of at least €80 million to allow Ekitike to leave the club following the conclusion of the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Arsenal line-ups vs PSV Eindhoven as Sterling and Jorginho start, Kiwior chance
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI vs PSV Eindhoven: Raya; White, Saliba, Kiwior, Tierney; Jorginho, Rice, Nwaneri, Martinelli, Trossard, Sterling. Truelove's Arsenal XI vs PSV Eindhoven: Raya; White, Saliba, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Zinchenko, Jorginho, Nwaneri; Martinelli, Merino, Sterling.

arts.sum: Liverpool are closing in on winning the Premier League title, with Arsenal's form plummeting and Arne Slot's side boasting a 15-point lead with just nine matches remaining
